summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Calendar View feature for KOLOR STUDIO CRM. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all 12 requested features including Month/Week/Day/Agenda views, service type filtering, color coding, navigation, and lead detail modal integration.
passed_tests: GET /api/leads/calendar/events - returns 200 with events array
GET /api/leads/calendar/events - accepts start and end date parameters
Calendar event structure has all required fields (id, leadId, title, date, type, status, clientName)
Calendar event types are valid (event, inquiry, booking)
BOOKED leads with eventDate appear as 'event' type in calendar
Service types included for color coding (PHOTOGRAPHY, VIDEOGRAPHY, BRANDING, etc.)
BOOKED events include value field for stats
Unauthorized access correctly rejected with 401
Test data present: Emmanuel (Photography), Michael (Videography), Sarah (Branding)
Event dates match expected: Emmanuel=Feb 25, Michael=Feb 27, Sarah=Mar 5
Stats endpoint returns BOOKED count for calendar summary
Calendar button in Dashboard toolbar (data-testid='view-calendar') - clickable
Month view displays calendar grid with events on correct dates
Week view displays 7-day columns with events
Day view shows single day with empty state for no events
Agenda view shows 3 upcoming events for next 30 days
Service type filter dropdown works (Photography/Videography/Branding/etc.)
Upcoming only toggle filters events
Navigation buttons (prev/next/today) work correctly
Clicking calendar event opens lead detail modal
Service type colors: Photography=purple, Videography=blue, Branding=orange
Stats summary shows Total Bookings (3), Upcoming (3), Total Value (₦500.00)
critical_code_review_comments: Calendar View component well-structured with proper data-testid attributes on all interactive elements
Color coding correctly mapped: PHOTOGRAPHY=purple, VIDEOGRAPHY=blue, BRANDING=orange, etc.
Filter logic using useMemo for performance with serviceFilter and showUpcomingOnly state
Navigation properly handles month/week/day increments with setCurrentDate
Agenda view correctly filters events for next 30 days and sorts by date
Lead detail modal integration working through onLeadClick callback
Stats calculation (upcomingCount, totalValue) computed efficiently with useMemo
seed_data_creation: 3 BOOKED leads with event dates already exist: Emmanuel (Photography, Feb 25), Michael Brown (Videography, Feb 27), Sarah Lee (Branding, Mar 5)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Calendar View feature is complete and working. All 4 views (month/week/day/agenda) functional. Service type color coding working correctly with service legend displayed. Filter by service type and upcoming toggle both working. Click on event opens LeadDetailModal. Stats summary shows Total Bookings, Upcoming count, and Total Value.
data_testid_elements_verified: view-calendar - Dashboard toolbar button to switch to calendar view
upcoming-toggle - Toggle to show only upcoming events

views.month: Grid calendar with events on correct dates, service type colors, 6-row layout
views.week: 7-day columns with events, day numbers, 'No events' placeholder
views.day: Single day events with full details, empty state for no events
views.agenda: Upcoming events list for next 30 days, sorted by date, shows service type badges

filters.service_type: Dropdown to filter by Photography, Videography, Branding, etc.

stats_summary.total_bookings: Count of all BOOKED events with eventDate
stats_summary.upcoming: Count of events with date >= today
stats_summary.total_value: Sum of event values with currency formatting

integration.lead_detail_modal: Click on event opens LeadDetailModal via onLeadClick callback

empty_state_verified: Calendar shows 'No bookings scheduled yet' message when no BOOKED leads with eventDate exist
